description: sec1 test vectors for LEXA Provision v1 (docs/adr/ADR-0002). Shared contract between the Dart app (packages/lexa_core, unit 1.5) and the Go hub (lexa-hub, unit H.2). Regenerated and verified by test/ble/session_test.dart.

key_derivation.curve: X25519; seeds are the raw 32-byte private scalars, clamped per RFC 7748 during scalar multiplication
key_derivation.kdf: K = HKDF-SHA256(ikm = X25519 shared secret, salt = UTF8(pop), info = UTF8("lexa-prov-v1"), length = 16)

aead.algorithm: AES-128-GCM; wire message = ciphertext || 16-byte tag; the nonce is never transmitted
aead.nonce: direction(1B) || 0x000000 || counter(8B big-endian); independent counter per direction starting at 0, incremented per message; the receiver decrypts under the exact next expected counter and aborts the session on any authentication failure

chunking.description: messages[0].ciphertext_hex framed by chunkMessage (byte0 flags: bit0 FIN, bit1 ENC; byte1 seq; then payload) at an ATT payload size of 23 bytes
